engine.ladder_reasoning: Marek Jankowski sells defined expertise — a podcasting course and book — and the whole property leans on personal credibility (23-yr mic origin story, founder narrative, certificate, graduate/alumni proof). Per the ladder, sells-defined-expertise resolves to trust before thing.

goal.one_action: Homepage front door: capture name+email opt-in to unlock a free training video (lead magnet); deeper pages sell the course and e-book via checkout.
goal.delegated_to: convertbox (opt-in) / tally; course+ebook checkout via malawielkafirma platform

structure.archetype_note: Info-product funnel: lead-magnet homepage feeding a paid course (3-tier checkout) + e-book purchase, plus a content blog and an alumni-outcomes showcase used as social proof.

mapped.observed_as: Korzyści z własnego podcastu (6 benefit cards)
Zobacz nagranie... (email+name opt-in to unlock video)
Myślisz o własnym podcaście? / Najtrudniejsze masz już za sobą
Ja też tego nie umiałem / About the author
Co wchodzi w skład kursu? (6 modules, 71 lessons) / Są też bonusy!
Start reading today / Dołącz do kursu

unmapped.observed: Absolwenci — filterable directory of 200+ graduate podcasts across 12 topic categories
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not testimonials (quotes) nor gallery/portfolio (owner's own work) nor content-index (owner's content feed) — it is a browsable directory of STUDENT outcomes used as results-proof.

proposed_new.name: storefront-checkout
proposed_new.evidence: Course page has on-site multi-tier checkout (Silver 1097 / Gold 1197 / Platinum 2397 PLN) with package-selection + payment-method + invoice fields (BLIK/card/installments); e-book 'Kup teraz / Zamów za 149 zł' — one-time-goods checkout.

proposed_new.name: content-index
proposed_new.evidence: Baza wiedzy page is a category-organized browsable grid of articles (Podstawy podcastingu, Nagrywanie i sprzęt, Promocja i zarabianie, Słuchanie) — a feed/index, not a single blog-teaser.

proposed_new.name: alumni-showcase
proposed_new.evidence: Absolwenci page: filterable directory of 200+ course-graduate podcasts across 12 topic categories, standing as results-proof — distinct from portfolio (owner's work), content-index (owner's feed), and testimonials (quotes).

design_style.none_fits_because: Conversion-optimized info-product funnel (VWO, Meta Pixel, Google Ads, Clarity, benefit-card grids, long persuasion, tiered pricing). design_hints empty (no fonts/colors captured) so this is inferred from structure; runner-up warm/human given the solo-educator personal voice.

confidence.why: fetch_quality=full so section/CTA/commerce data is rich, but the ICP call is genuinely borderline (clean lead-magnet homepage vs a real 3-tier course checkout + e-book purchase pushes it out of single-conversion ICP), engine trust-vs-thing is debatable, and design_hints are empty so design_style is inferred.

gap_findings: Mixed-job property: one domain runs a lead-magnet front door AND a course checkout AND an e-book sale AND a blog AND an alumni directory — the taxonomy assumes ONE conversion action per site; nothing expresses a multi-job funnel where the homepage is in-ICP but deeper pages transact.
Alumni/student-outcome directory as a proof form is not representable in the closed capability vocab or canonical sections (coined alumni-showcase).

Lead-magnet gated-content opt-in (email unlocks a training video) is functionally distinct from a plain contact lead-form and from newsletter subscribe, but collapses to 'form' in the mechanism taxonomy.
